Petition For The Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of The Personal Representative And For An Order
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-04-2019 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Continued To Feb-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dustin MacFarlane appeared by telephone for and with Donald Cordero (present).

Mr. MacFarlane stated that he will be filing a petition for termination under Probate Code 12251, that there are no assets to administer, that the petition is prepared and that as soon as it gets signed by Mr. Cordero he will file it. The Petition to Continue to Keep the Estate Open, etc. is continued to February 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of the petition to terminate.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dustin MacFarlane for Donald Cordero.

Mr. MacFarlane stated that he will be filing a petition to withdraw the status petition, that there is no estate to administer, that everything transferred by right of survivorship to the Surviving Spouse and that they have now opened probate for Bertha (Surviving Spouse). Mr. MacFarlane also stated that he has not substituted in as Counsel and that he will be filing a substitution in about ten days. The Status Petition is continued to December 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Continued To Jan-22-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Donald Cordero in Propria Persona.
Erlinda Cordero (Wife of Donald) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Cordero stated that they used Zillow to determine the value of the house, that the will nominates Donald as the Executor, spoke of executor duties, stated that cash was missing in the accounting that was provided by Debra Dolch, that the will was given to Ms. Dolch and that Donald is a contingent beneficiary. Mr. Cordero stated the Conservator filed a change of address and closed out the account without finishing the paper work, that he was never told about his Mother's medical condition and that the will was never put into probate. The Court stated that the sole beneficiary is the Mother and that there is nothing in the estate to probate. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
